gist.headline: Mharomo joins the hive
gist.blurb: Mharomo.systems just landed in our community showcase! It's a slick new app for generating images, music, videos, and voice content all from simple prompts.
gist.summary: Added Mharomo.systems to the community app showcase, highlighting its ability to generate images, music, video, and voice from simple prompts.
gist.impact: The community can now discover a new all-in-one multimedia generation tool built on Pollinations infrastructure.
gist.visual_concept: A cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee enjoying a multimedia setup. Since Mharomo.systems handles images, music, videos, and voice, Polly could be wearing headphones and watching a retro TV or monitor displaying a colorful landscape, surrounded by musical notes and film strips.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny headphones, sitting in front of a retro TV monitor showing a colorful landscape. Small pixelated musical notes and film strips float in the air around her. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
